name: OneLogin Stale Active Accounts (365 days)
description: Detects active OneLogin accounts with no login activity for at least 365 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS account_name, u.last_login AS last_login FROM onelogin_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.status, 0) = 1 AND (u.last_login IS NULL OR u.last_login < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Disable long-dormant accounts and require formal approval before any reactivation.
